issue.title: Tau watchdog proof: fresh compliance UI handoff

commands.command: curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:4301/api/tau/watchdog/receipt-chain | tee /tmp/tau-watchdog-receipt-chain-api.json | jq '{ok, error, schema:.receipt.schema, live:.receipt.live, mocked:.receipt.mocked, runId:.receipt.runId, issue:.receipt.issue, selectedAgent:.receipt.commandLoop.selectedAgent, terminalAgent:.receipt.commandLoop.terminalAgent, dryRun:.receipt.githubTransport.dryRun, applied:.receipt.githubTransport.applied}'
commands.result: ok true, live true, mocked false, selectedAgent reviewer, terminalAgent human, dryRun true, applied false
wrote CDP screenshot and read_json marker
captured panel screenshot with Watchdog Receipt Chain, CRON RECEIPT, issue #15 CLOSED, reviewer, human, dry-run, applied=false

proves: UX Lab #tau can load the Tau-owned watchdog proof manifest through a live local API route and render the receipt chain in the Tau chat integration viewer.
The visible panel shows the installed project-watchdog cron run id, closed GitHub issue #15, selected non-human reviewer route, terminal human route, and dry-run terminal GitHub transport boundary.
The API route fails closed through manifest and artifact validation before returning tau.watchdog_receipt_chain_view.v1.
does_not_prove: Browser chat rendering for a new fresh compliance turn after this panel change.
Semantic correctness of the compliance answer.
Human acceptance of the terminal human route.

residual_risk: The pi-mono pre-commit hook failed on unrelated existing lint diagnostics outside the three Tau files; the scoped Tau tests and TypeScript command passed before commit.
The first CDP screenshot captured the top of the Tau page; a second targeted Playwright screenshot was required to visually inspect the watchdog panel.
